decisions.question: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace
decisions.chosen: Scoped dedup and DM participant caches by workspace
decisions.reasoning: Merged websocket fan-in can reuse event IDs or conversation IDs across workspaces, so broker-side dedup and participant resolution must include workspace identity to avoid cross-workspace drops and cache poisoning.

decisions.question: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces
decisions.chosen: Kept legacy single-workspace envs as default-workspace compatibility surfaces
decisions.reasoning: Child processes and older dashboards still expect RELAY_API_KEY/workspaceKey semantics, so the runtime now exposes multi-workspace memberships while preserving a default workspace for legacy flows.
